name: local-2fa
title: Local 2FA Codes
description: Generate 2FA TOTP codes offline, locally and privately.
author: DavidSitjes

commands.name: list-codes
commands.title: List Codes
commands.subtitle: Daily use
commands.description: List and copy local TOTP codes.

commands.name: add-secret
commands.title: Add Account
commands.subtitle: Manual or otpauth URL
commands.description: Add a 2FA account manually or paste an otpauth URL.

commands.name: import-google-migration
commands.title: Import Google Migration
commands.subtitle: Paste migration URL
commands.description: Import multiple accounts from otpauth-migration URL.

commands.name: import-from-qr-image
commands.title: Import from QR Image
commands.subtitle: Recommended for QR screenshots
commands.description: Import from local QR image (otpauth or migration payload).

preferences.name: masterPassword
preferences.title: Master Password
preferences.description: Local master password used to derive the AES-256-GCM encryption key. Minimum 10 characters; 15+ recommended. No recovery if forgotten.
